source: LVSlotPro repo Slots/<slug>/ — edit and run npm run slots:sync

ap.volatility_summary: Hybrid map + RNG battles + jackpot wedge: scouting helps, but variance on monster fights and jackpot spin remains large.
ap.popularity_summary: Often spotted in smaller / mid-tier rooms; comparatively less locals pressure than marquee bonus-meter games.
edge_vectors: Two-seat linked cabinet: separate bonus meters — **scout the side you intend to buy**.
Adventure spins (three Adventure Time icons) wheel-move the map ~1–6 spaces; defeating **Skeleton → Snake → Cyclops** opens a jackpot **chance** spin, not a lock.
Stronger scouting heuristic (trip report): **two of three monsters defeated** and **Cyclops positioned close** on your path so fewer clean map hits are wasted.
ap.bankroll_angle: Treat as incremental-reveal + RNG chain: battles can fail after a "good" move; jackpot spin can brick even after Cyclops clears. Budget for full whiffs.
verification_checklist: Photo monster states + jackpot seed if shown; confirm bet denomination and any per-seat linkage.
Read help/rules for jackpot ladder (author cites typical $500+ seed, rarely >$600 — verify).
common_pitfalls: **Overshoot:** landing past the Cyclops forces waiting for another lap.
**Battle loss:** stepping on Cyclops ≠ guaranteed kill.
**Jackpot whiff:** post-battle spin can pay small wedges ($5–$100 on a cited 50¢ config) vs jackpot.
**Wrong seat:** scouting partner-side meters without intending to fund that wager.
ap.nerf_angle: **Low–Medium** procedural risk via marketing/paytable refresh; scarcity means less AP pressure but also fewer playable instances.
